prompt: Align the three icons to the right of ‘Follow Us,’ 12 px apart, all baseline-aligned.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by adding three social media icons. Place the Instagram, Twitter, and Facebook icons from image 2 horizontally to the right of the existing 'FOLLOW US' text. Ensure these three icons are spaced 12 pixels apart from each other and are all baseline-aligned with the 'FOLLOW US' text.
objects: Instagram icon (to the right of 'FOLLOW US' text, horizontally aligned)
Twitter icon (to the right of 'FOLLOW US' text, horizontally aligned)
Facebook icon (to the right of 'FOLLOW US' text, horizontally aligned)
